title: Lumina Prime V3
description: Ultra-thin glass laminate engineered for modern rooftops. Prime V3 balances aesthetics and output with a seamless, liquid-glass finish. Features 22.4% peak module efficiency.

title: Vault Core
description: 12.5 kWh modular storage system with silent active cooling. Designed to integrate perfectly into premium architectural spaces while providing reliable backup power.

title: Nexus Inverter
description: Hybrid inverter with adaptive optimization technology. Seamlessly manages power between solar, battery, and grid with a focus on efficiency and heat dissipation.

title: Horizon OS
description: Real-time insights and alerts for your entire solar ecosystem. Privacy-first architecture ensures your data stays yours while providing deep performance analytics.

title: White-Glove Installation
description: Premium architectural fit with total cable concealment and a clean finish. Our master technicians ensure your system looks as good as it performs.

title: Annual Care Plan
description: Comprehensive annual inspection, including firmware checks, panel cleaning, and performance tuning to keep your investment at peak output.

title: Vault Core XL
description: Enhanced 20 kWh capacity storage for estate-scale requirements. Features smart peak-shaving technology to maximize your savings during high-tariff hours.

title: Architectural Site Survey
description: Full shading analysis, layout plan, and cable routing proposal. Delivered as a comprehensive 48-hour report to kickstart your solar transition.

title: Lumina Prime V3+
description: High-output glass module designed specifically for estate-scale roofs. Features superior low-light performance and an ultra-durable frame construction.
